$comment: BD-FIXTURES — GROUND TRUTH for the COST-ESTIMATE gate on metered ingestion actions (release-spec DD-18: metered actions present a pre-run cost estimate + confirm; §11.2 budget.indexing_requires_estimate). The brand-DNA flow has TWO metered actions: (1) SCRAPE (only when a scraper adapter is configured — manual/export submission is FREE and ungated), and (2) DNA SYNTHESIS (host seat). A test asserts the flow computes these estimates and requires confirmation BEFORE spending; the fixture/zero-key adapters report cost_usd 0 (no real spend) but still exercise the estimate+confirm control path. Values are illustrative-as-of-fixture, not live pricing. ALL SYNTHETIC. See PROVENANCE.md.

metered_actions.when: only if a scraper adapter is configured; manual/export submission is free and ungated (RD-9)

estimate.note: fixture adapter — zero spend; a real BYO adapter quotes its own per-item cost here

metered_actions.when: only if a synthesis seat is wired; cold-start (no seat) degrades to the authoring template and is ungated (DD-21)

estimate.note: fixture seat — zero spend; a real host seat reports actual metered spend the §11.2 budget caps
